title: マイルCSの後に・夢は何度でも！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I gave it my all and set the track ablaze... And
you know what? I kept up with Oguri and won the
race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As soon as it was over, I knew it was the ultimate
race, but Oguri herself confirmed it afterward.
She said it was "awesome."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And then she told me her dream is to beat me in our next race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I may have made my dream come true, but this
isn't the end. I'm going to keep finding new ones
to chase after!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is just the beginning of our dreams! We're
gonna keep heating things up and creating even
more unforgettable races for the history books!
